sentences.english: I love giving gifts more than receiving them.
sentences.korean: 선물 받는 것보다 주는 게 더 좋아요.

sentences.english: Seeing someone's face light up is the best feeling.
sentences.korean: 누군가의 얼굴이 환해지는 걸 보는 건 최고의 기분이에요.

sentences.english: I usually just give money or gift cards because I never know what to buy.
sentences.korean: 뭘 사야 할지 몰라서 보통 돈이나 상품권을 줘요.

sentences.english: I think handmade gifts are the most meaningful.
sentences.korean: 수제 선물이 가장 의미 있다고 생각해요.

sentences.english: Even a simple card with a personal message means a lot.
sentences.korean: 개인적인 메시지가 담긴 간단한 카드도 많은 의미가 있어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
